queries.question: Present to me the fee value that is most popular for all debit cards.
queries.sql: SELECT Fees.FeeValue  from Debit_Card_Fees join Fees on Debit_Card_Fees.FeeType = Fees.FeeType join Debit_Cards on Debit_Card_Fees.CardID = Debit_Cards.CardID   GROUP BY Debit_Card_Fees.FeeType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Debit_Card_Fees.CardID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Debit_Cards)

queries.question: For each debit card, give me the related fee value.
queries.sql: select debit_cards.customername , fees.feevalue from Debit_Card_Fees join Fees on Debit_Card_Fees.FeeType = Fees.FeeType join Debit_Cards on Debit_Card_Fees.CardID = Debit_Cards.CardID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?customername ?feevalue WHERE {
  ?debit_card_fees a :Debit_Card_Fees .
  ?fees a :Fees .
  ?debit_card_fees p:hasFees ?fees .
  ?debit_cards a :Debit_Cards .
  ?debit_card_fees p:hasDebit_Cards ?debit_cards .
  ?debit_cards p:CustomerName ?customername .
  ?fees p:FeeValue ?feevalue .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the fee value for every debit card?
